title: The Horror Modpack
description: This modpack contains a BUNCH of scary horror mods to TERRIFY and DESTROY your world.
body:
![The Horror Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d1d5de923f2f69edb9ffe16d7046a94c25341a.png) 

_created by TheJeffDude_

## This Modpack Contains(so far):

- From the Depths
- From the Fog
- Horror Cryptid(Bigfoot)
- I HATE FLESH: Reborn
- Nyctophobia
- Slenderman: The Revival
- The Man From the Fog
- The Plague of the Moon
- Vetala Dweller
- What lies...
AND MANY OTHER SHADER & PERFORMANCE MODS!

### Make sure to subscribe to my channel: [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGb0Ut4-aawQYjW2YycKHyw](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGb0Ut4-aawQYjW2YycKHyw)
